name: nginx-multisite
description: Provisions an Nginx web server with three SSL-enabled virtual hosts, self-signed TLS certificate generation per vhost, HTTP-to-HTTPS redirection, and a global security hardening layer including fail2ban, UFW firewall, kernel sysctl hardening, and per-site static HTML content deployment.

name: cache
description: Deploys a dual in-memory caching layer consisting of Memcached (via the upstream Supermarket cookbook) and a password-authenticated Redis instance on port 6379, including a post-install workaround to strip deprecated directives from the generated Redis configuration file.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Performs an end-to-end deployment of a Python FastAPI application cloned from GitHub, running inside a Python virtual environment under systemd, backed by a locally-provisioned PostgreSQL database with a dedicated user and database, and configured via a .env file containing database credentials.
